headline: Switzerland staleness-rotation assessment. Last assessed April 17 2026 (18 days). Exemplary band, no active news in May 2026 recency window. Existing assessment scores (AWR/EMP/ACT/ACC/SYS/INT 87.5; EQU 75; BND 93.8; composite 84.4) consistent with current evidence base — Geneva humanitarian hub status, refugee-protection framework, neutrality framework, mandatory health insurance, refugee university pilot continuing. Composite confirmation: 84.4 → 84.4 sustained. Note: scanner rotation-state cited published composite as 92.5; index file confirms 84.4 (current applied composite). Recommend confirm.
key_evidence: April 17 2026 baseline assessment sustained: Geneva global humanitarian hub status, ICRC partnership, UN Geneva headquarters.
Ukraine S-status protection extended to March 2026 (cumulative); refugee university pilot March 2025 launch.
Neutrality framework under debate per ongoing initiative process; SNP restrictions on military alignment maintained.
Mandatory health insurance system; high per-capita healthcare spending.
UN humanitarian funding cuts 2025 impacting Switzerland-based organizations (sustained negative signal).
No active news in May 2026 recency window.
